257:   }

262:   Padding padding_;

264:   bool takes_shape_;

266:   TF_DISALLOW_COPY_AND_ASSIGN(Conv3DBackpropInputOp);

269: // Custom backprop for input that explicitly does the work sharding and calls
270: // Eigen only to multiply matrices.
271: template <typename Device, class T>
272: class Conv3DCustomBackpropInputOp : public OpKernel {
273:   // Limit the maximum size of allocated temporary buffer to
274:   // kMaxTempAllocationOverhead times the size of the input tensors (input,
275:   // filter, out_backprop). If the size of the temporary buffer exceeds this
276:   // limit, fallback on Eigen implementation.
277:   static constexpr int kMaxTempAllocationOverhead = 25;
278: 
279:  public:
280:   explicit Conv3DCustomBackpropInputOp(OpKernelConstruction* context)
281:       : OpKernel(context),
282:         data_format_(FORMAT_NHWC),
283:         takes_shape_(type_string().find("V2") != std::string::npos) {
284:     // data_format is only available in V2.
285:     if (takes_shape_) {
286:       string data_format;
287:       OP_REQUIRES_OK(context, context->GetAttr("data_format", &data_format));
288:       OP_REQUIRES(context, FormatFromString(data_format, &data_format_),
289:                   errors::InvalidArgument("Invalid data format"));
290:       OP_REQUIRES(
291:           context, data_format_ == FORMAT_NHWC,
292:           errors::InvalidArgument(
293:               "Conv3DBackpropInputOpV2 only supports NDHWC on the CPU."));
294:     }
295: 
296:     OP_REQUIRES_OK(context, context->GetAttr("dilations", &dilation_));
297:     OP_REQUIRES(context, dilation_.size() == 5,
298:                 errors::InvalidArgument("Dilation rates field must "
299:                                         "specify 5 dimensions"));
300:     OP_REQUIRES(context,
301:                 (GetTensorDim(dilation_, data_format_, 'C') == 1 &&
302:                  GetTensorDim(dilation_, data_format_, 'N') == 1),
303:                 errors::InvalidArgument(
304:                     "Current implementation does not yet support "
305:                     "dilation rates in the batch and depth dimensions."));
306: 
307:     // TODO(yangzihao): Add CPU version of dilated conv 3D.
308:     OP_REQUIRES(context,
309:                 (GetTensorDim(dilation_, data_format_, '0') == 1 &&
310:                  GetTensorDim(dilation_, data_format_, '1') == 1 &&
311:                  GetTensorDim(dilation_, data_format_, '2') == 1),
312:                 errors::InvalidArgument(
313:                     "Current CPU implementation does not yet support "
314:                     "dilation rates larger than 1."));
315: 
316:     OP_REQUIRES_OK(context, context->GetAttr("strides", &stride_));
317:     OP_REQUIRES(context, stride_.size() == 5,
318:                 errors::InvalidArgument("Sliding window strides field must "
319:                                         "specify 5 dimensions"));
320:     OP_REQUIRES(
321:         context,
322:         (GetTensorDim(stride_, data_format_, 'C') == 1 &&
323:          GetTensorDim(stride_, data_format_, 'N') == 1),
324:         errors::InvalidArgument("Current implementation does not yet support "
325:                                 "strides in the batch and depth dimensions."));
326:     OP_REQUIRES_OK(context, context->GetAttr("padding", &padding_));
327:   }
328: 
329:   void Compute(OpKernelContext* context) override {
330:     const Tensor& filter = context->input(1);
331:     const TensorShape& filter_shape = filter.shape();
332: 
333:     const Tensor& out_backprop = context->input(2);
334:     const TensorShape& out_backprop_shape = out_backprop.shape();
335: 
336:     TensorShape input_shape;
337:     if (takes_shape_) {
338:       const Tensor& input_sizes = context->input(0);
339:       // MakeShape is able to handle both DT_INT32 and DT_INT64 for input_sizes.
340:       OP_REQUIRES_OK(context, MakeShape(input_sizes, &input_shape));
341:     } else {
342:       input_shape = context->input(0).shape();
343:     }
344: 
345:     ConvBackpropDimensions dims;
346:     OP_REQUIRES_OK(context, ConvBackpropComputeDimensions(
347:                                 "Conv3DBackpropInputOp", /*num_spatial_dims=*/3,
348:                                 input_shape, filter_shape, out_backprop_shape,
349:                                 stride_, padding_, data_format_, &dims));
350: 
351:     Tensor* in_backprop;
352:     OP_REQUIRES_OK(context,
353:                    context->allocate_output(0, input_shape, &in_backprop));
354: 
355:     int64 top_pad_planes, bottom_pad_planes;
356:     int64 top_pad_rows, bottom_pad_rows;
357:     int64 left_pad_cols, right_pad_cols;
358: 
359:     OP_REQUIRES_OK(context, GetWindowedOutputSizeVerbose(
360:                                 dims.spatial_dims[0].input_size,
361:                                 dims.spatial_dims[0].filter_size,
362:                                 dims.spatial_dims[0].stride, padding_,
363:                                 &dims.spatial_dims[0].output_size,
364:                                 &top_pad_planes, &bottom_pad_planes));
365:     OP_REQUIRES_OK(context, GetWindowedOutputSizeVerbose(
366:                                 dims.spatial_dims[1].input_size,
367:                                 dims.spatial_dims[1].filter_size,
368:                                 dims.spatial_dims[1].stride, padding_,
369:                                 &dims.spatial_dims[1].output_size,
370:                                 &top_pad_rows, &bottom_pad_rows));
371:     OP_REQUIRES_OK(context, GetWindowedOutputSizeVerbose(
372:                                 dims.spatial_dims[2].input_size,
373:                                 dims.spatial_dims[2].filter_size,
374:                                 dims.spatial_dims[2].stride, padding_,
375:                                 &dims.spatial_dims[2].output_size,
376:                                 &left_pad_cols, &right_pad_cols));
377: 
378:     // TODO(ezhulenev): Extract work size and shard estimation to shared
379:     // functions in conv_grad_ops, and update 2d convolution backprop.
380: 
381:     // The total dimension size of each kernel.
382:     const int64 filter_total_size =
383:         dims.spatial_dims[0].filter_size * dims.spatial_dims[1].filter_size *
384:         dims.spatial_dims[2].filter_size * dims.in_depth;
385: 
386:     // The output image size is the spatial size of the output.
387:     const int64 output_image_size = dims.spatial_dims[0].output_size *
388:                                     dims.spatial_dims[1].output_size *
389:                                     dims.spatial_dims[2].output_size;
390: 
391:     const auto cache_sizes = Eigen::internal::CacheSizes();
392:     const ptrdiff_t l3_cache_size = cache_sizes.m_l3;
393: 
394:     // Use L3 cache size as target working set size.
395:     const size_t target_working_set_size = l3_cache_size / sizeof(T);
396: 
397:     // Calculate size of matrices involved in MatMul: C = A x B.
398:     const int64 size_A = output_image_size * dims.out_depth;
399: 
400:     const int64 size_B = filter_total_size * dims.out_depth;
401: 
402:     const int64 size_C = output_image_size * filter_total_size;
403: 
404:     const int64 work_unit_size = size_A + size_B + size_C;
405: 
406:     auto worker_threads = *(context->device()->tensorflow_cpu_worker_threads());
407: 
408:     // Use parallel tensor contractions if there is no batching.
409:     //
410:     // Compared to Conv2D code, this version is missing work size estimation. In
411:     // benchmarks I didn't find a case when it's beneficial to run parallel
412:     // contraction compared to sharding and matmuls.
413:     const bool use_parallel_contraction = dims.batch_size == 1;
414: 
415:     const size_t shard_size =
416:         use_parallel_contraction
417:             ? 1
418:             : (target_working_set_size + work_unit_size - 1) / work_unit_size;
419: 
420:     // Total number of elements in all the tensors used by this kernel.
421:     int64 total_tensor_elements = input_shape.num_elements() +
422:                                   filter_shape.num_elements() +
423:                                   out_backprop_shape.num_elements();
424: 
425:     // Shape of the temporary workspace buffer.
426:     TensorShape col_buffer_shape = {static_cast<int64>(shard_size),
427:                                     static_cast<int64>(output_image_size),
428:                                     static_cast<int64>(filter_total_size)};
429:     int64 col_buffer_elements = col_buffer_shape.num_elements();
430: 
431:     // If the temporary allocation overhead is too large, fallback on Eigen
432:     // implementation which requires much less memory.
433:     int64 col_buffer_overhead = col_buffer_elements / total_tensor_elements;
434:     if (col_buffer_overhead > kMaxTempAllocationOverhead) {
435:       VLOG(2) << "Fallback on Eigen implementation of Conv3DBackpropInputOp: "
436:                  "col_buffer_overhead="
437:               << col_buffer_overhead;
438: 
439:       functor::CuboidConvolutionBackwardInput<Device, T>()(
440:           context->eigen_device<Device>(),
441:           in_backprop->tensor<T, 5>(),                     // input_backward
442:           filter.tensor<T, 5>(),                           // filter
443:           out_backprop.tensor<T, 5>(),                     // output_backward
444:           static_cast<int>(dims.spatial_dims[0].stride),   // stride_planes
445:           static_cast<int>(dims.spatial_dims[1].stride),   // stride_rows
446:           static_cast<int>(dims.spatial_dims[2].stride));  // stride_cols
447: 
448:       return;
449:     }
450: 
451:     Tensor col_buffer;
452:     OP_REQUIRES_OK(context,
453:                    context->allocate_temp(DataTypeToEnum<T>::value,
454:                                           col_buffer_shape, &col_buffer));
455: 
456:     // The input offset corresponding to a single input image.
457:     const int64 input_offset = dims.spatial_dims[0].input_size *
458:                                dims.spatial_dims[1].input_size *
459:                                dims.spatial_dims[2].input_size * dims.in_depth;

(Showing lines 220-459 of 1954. Use offset=460 to continue.)

731: // Custom backprop for filter that explicitly does the work sharding and calls
732: // Eigen only to multiply matrices.
733: template <typename Device, class T>
734: class Conv3DCustomBackpropFilterOp : public OpKernel {
735:   // Limit the maximum size of allocated temporary buffer to
736:   // kMaxTempAllocationOverhead times the size of the input tensors (input,
737:   // filter, out_backprop). If the size of the temporary buffer exceeds this
738:   // limit, fallback on Eigen implementation.
739:   static constexpr int kMaxTempAllocationOverhead = 25;
740: 
741:  public:
742:   explicit Conv3DCustomBackpropFilterOp(OpKernelConstruction* context)
743:       : OpKernel(context),
744:         data_format_(FORMAT_NHWC),
745:         takes_shape_(type_string().find("V2") != std::string::npos) {
746:     // data_format is only available in V2.
747:     if (takes_shape_) {
748:       string data_format;
749:       OP_REQUIRES_OK(context, context->GetAttr("data_format", &data_format));
750:       OP_REQUIRES(context, FormatFromString(data_format, &data_format_),
751:                   errors::InvalidArgument("Invalid data format"));
752:       OP_REQUIRES(
753:           context, data_format_ == FORMAT_NHWC,
754:           errors::InvalidArgument(
755:               "Conv3DBackpropFilterOpV2 only supports NDHWC on the CPU."));
756:     }
757: 
758:     OP_REQUIRES_OK(context, context->GetAttr("dilations", &dilation_));
759:     OP_REQUIRES(context, dilation_.size() == 5,
760:                 errors::InvalidArgument("Dilation rates field must "
761:                                         "specify 5 dimensions"));
762:     OP_REQUIRES(context,
763:                 (GetTensorDim(dilation_, data_format_, 'C') == 1 &&
764:                  GetTensorDim(dilation_, data_format_, 'N') == 1),
765:                 errors::InvalidArgument(
766:                     "Current implementation does not yet support "
767:                     "dilation rates in the batch and depth dimensions."));
768: 
769:     // TODO(yangzihao): Add CPU version of dilated conv 3D.
770:     OP_REQUIRES(context,
771:                 (GetTensorDim(dilation_, data_format_, '0') == 1 &&
772:                  GetTensorDim(dilation_, data_format_, '1') == 1 &&
773:                  GetTensorDim(dilation_, data_format_, '2') == 1),
774:                 errors::InvalidArgument(
775:                     "Current CPU implementation does not yet support "
776:                     "dilation rates larger than 1."));
777: 
778:     OP_REQUIRES_OK(context, context->GetAttr("strides", &stride_));
779:     OP_REQUIRES(context, stride_.size() == 5,
780:                 errors::InvalidArgument("Sliding window strides field must "
781:                                         "specify 5 dimensions"));
782:     OP_REQUIRES(
783:         context,
784:         (GetTensorDim(stride_, data_format_, 'C') == 1 &&
785:          GetTensorDim(stride_, data_format_, 'N') == 1),
786:         errors::InvalidArgument("Current implementation does not yet support "
787:                                 "strides in the batch and depth dimensions."));
788:     OP_REQUIRES_OK(context, context->GetAttr("padding", &padding_));
789:   }
790: 
791:   void Compute(OpKernelContext* context) override {
792:     const Tensor& input = context->input(0);
793:     const TensorShape& input_shape = input.shape();
794: 
795:     const Tensor& out_backprop = context->input(2);
796:     const TensorShape& out_backprop_shape = out_backprop.shape();
797: 
798:     TensorShape filter_shape;
799:     if (takes_shape_) {
800:       const Tensor& filter_sizes = context->input(1);
801:       OP_REQUIRES_OK(context, TensorShapeUtils::MakeShape(
802:                                   filter_sizes.vec<int32>(), &filter_shape));
803:     } else {
804:       filter_shape = context->input(1).shape();
805:     }
806: 
807:     ConvBackpropDimensions dims;
808:     OP_REQUIRES_OK(context,
809:                    ConvBackpropComputeDimensions(
810:                        "Conv3DBackpropFilterOp", /*num_spatial_dims=*/3,
811:                        input_shape, filter_shape, out_backprop_shape, stride_,
812:                        padding_, data_format_, &dims));
813: 
814:     Tensor* filter_backprop;
815:     OP_REQUIRES_OK(context,
816:                    context->allocate_output(0, filter_shape, &filter_backprop));
817: 
818:     if (input_shape.num_elements() == 0) {
819:       filter_backprop->template flat<T>().setZero();
820:       return;
821:     }
822: 
823:     int64 top_pad_planes, bottom_pad_planes;
824:     int64 top_pad_rows, bottom_pad_rows;
825:     int64 left_pad_cols, right_pad_cols;
826: 
827:     OP_REQUIRES_OK(context, GetWindowedOutputSizeVerbose(
828:                                 dims.spatial_dims[0].input_size,
829:                                 dims.spatial_dims[0].filter_size,
830:                                 dims.spatial_dims[0].stride, padding_,
831:                                 &dims.spatial_dims[0].output_size,
832:                                 &top_pad_planes, &bottom_pad_planes));
833:     OP_REQUIRES_OK(context, GetWindowedOutputSizeVerbose(
834:                                 dims.spatial_dims[1].input_size,
835:                                 dims.spatial_dims[1].filter_size,
836:                                 dims.spatial_dims[1].stride, padding_,
837:                                 &dims.spatial_dims[1].output_size,
838:                                 &top_pad_rows, &bottom_pad_rows));
839:     OP_REQUIRES_OK(context, GetWindowedOutputSizeVerbose(
840:                                 dims.spatial_dims[2].input_size,
841:                                 dims.spatial_dims[2].filter_size,
842:                                 dims.spatial_dims[2].stride, padding_,
843:                                 &dims.spatial_dims[2].output_size,
844:                                 &left_pad_cols, &right_pad_cols));
845: 
846:     // TODO(ezhulenev): Extract work size and shard estimation to shared
847:     // functions in conv_grad_ops, and update 2d convolution backprop.
848: 
849:     // The total dimension size of each kernel.
850:     const int64 filter_total_size =
851:         dims.spatial_dims[0].filter_size * dims.spatial_dims[1].filter_size *
852:         dims.spatial_dims[2].filter_size * dims.in_depth;
853:     // The output image size is the spatial size of the output.
854:     const int64 output_image_size = dims.spatial_dims[0].output_size *
855:                                     dims.spatial_dims[1].output_size *
856:                                     dims.spatial_dims[2].output_size;
857: 
858:     // Shard 'batch' images (volumes) into 'shard_size' groups of images
859:     // (volumes) to be fed into the parallel matmul. Calculate 'shard_size' by
860:     // dividing the L3 cache size ('target_working_set_size') by the matmul size
861:     // of an individual image ('work_unit_size').
862: 
863:     const auto cache_sizes = Eigen::internal::CacheSizes();
864:     const ptrdiff_t l3_cache_size = cache_sizes.m_l3;
865: 
866:     // TODO(andydavis)
867:     // *) Consider reducing 'target_working_set_size' if L3 is shared by
868:     //    other concurrently running tensorflow ops.
869:     const size_t target_working_set_size = l3_cache_size / sizeof(T);
870: 
871:     const int64 size_A = output_image_size * filter_total_size;
872: 
873:     const int64 size_B = output_image_size * dims.out_depth;
874: 
875:     const int64 size_C = filter_total_size * dims.out_depth;
876:

625: // Backprop for filter that offloads computation to

627: template <typename Device, class T>
628: class Conv3DBackpropFilterOp : public OpKernel {
629:  public:
630:   explicit Conv3DBackpropFilterOp(OpKernelConstruction* context)
631:       : OpKernel(context),
632:         data_format_(FORMAT_NHWC),
633:         takes_shape_(type_string().find("V2") != std::string::npos) {
634:     // data_format is only available in V2.
635:     if (takes_shape_) {
636:       string data_format;
637:       OP_REQUIRES_OK(context, context->GetAttr("data_format", &data_format));
638:       OP_REQUIRES(context, FormatFromString(data_format, &data_format_),
639:                   errors::InvalidArgument("Invalid data format"));
640:       OP_REQUIRES(
641:           context, data_format_ == FORMAT_NHWC,
642:           errors::InvalidArgument(
643:               "Conv3DBackpropFilterOpV2 only supports NDHWC on the CPU."));
644:     }
645: 
646:     OP_REQUIRES_OK(context, context->GetAttr("dilations", &dilation_));
647:     OP_REQUIRES(context, dilation_.size() == 5,
648:                 errors::InvalidArgument("Dilation rates field must "
649:                                         "specify 5 dimensions"));
650:     OP_REQUIRES(context,
651:                 (GetTensorDim(dilation_, data_format_, 'C') == 1 &&
652:                  GetTensorDim(dilation_, data_format_, 'N') == 1),
653:                 errors::InvalidArgument(
654:                     "Current implementation does not yet support "
655:                     "dilation rates in the batch and depth dimensions."));
656: 
657:     // TODO(yangzihao): Add CPU version of dilated conv 3D.
658:     OP_REQUIRES(context,
659:                 (GetTensorDim(dilation_, data_format_, '0') == 1 &&
660:                  GetTensorDim(dilation_, data_format_, '1') == 1 &&
661:                  GetTensorDim(dilation_, data_format_, '2') == 1),
662:                 errors::InvalidArgument(
663:                     "Current CPU implementation does not yet support "
664:                     "dilation rates larger than 1."));
665: 
666:     OP_REQUIRES_OK(context, context->GetAttr("strides", &stride_));
667:     OP_REQUIRES(context, stride_.size() == 5,
668:                 errors::InvalidArgument("Sliding window strides field must "

670:     OP_REQUIRES(
671:         context,
672:         (GetTensorDim(stride_, data_format_, 'C') == 1 &&
